attributes.action: BRING BACK THE MCDONALDS BREAKFAST ROLL PERIOD.
attributes.additional_details: The breakfast roll isn’t just a breakfast roll, it’s my joy and happiness it’s what makes my day. It makes me be productive and it makes me want to continue living. Without it life is pointless, what’s the point of living when you only have McMuffins they are so plain and old school. McDonald’s need to bring back that little jazz. I feel like if they don’t I’ll strive to be the new McDonald’s ceo and make that the MAIN item on the menu that you can get all day not just in the morning.
attributes.background: Please bring back the McDonald’s breakfast roll. I am a loyal customer and i haven’t had it in so long it’s devastating honestly I sigh whenever ordering because I know it’s not there, it makes me want to cry and that’s not good as a UK CITIZEN I should be happy, and my happiness means bring it back
